name: 重建时期
subject: history
domain_name: Period 4-5 扩张与内战 Expansion & Civil War (1800-1877)
curriculum_points: Explain the causes and effects of the innovations in technology, agriculture, and commerce over time.
Innovations including textile machinery, steam engines, interchangeable parts, the telegraph, and agricultural inventions increased the efficiency of production methods.

Legislation and judicial systems supported the development of roads, canals, and railroads, which extended and enlarged markets and helped foster regional interdependence. Transportation networks linked the North and Midwest more closely than they linked regions in the South.
Increasing Southern cotton production and the related growth of Northern manufacturing, banking, and shipping industries promoted the development of national and international commercial ties.

excerpts.text: Explain the causes and effects of the innovations in technology, agriculture, and commerce over time.
Innovations including textile machinery, steam engines, interchangeable parts, the telegraph, and agricultural inventions increased the efficiency of production methods.

Legislation and judicial systems supported the development of roads, canals, and railroads, which extended and enlarged markets and helped foster regional interdependence. Transportation networks linked the North and Midwest more closely than they linked regions in the South.
Increasing Southern cotton production and the related growth of Northern manufacturing, banking, and shipping industries promoted the development of national and international commercial ties.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 历史时间轴：朝代/事件节点交互，点击展开详情卡片

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「重建时期」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Explain the causes and effects of the innovations in technology, agriculture, and commerce over time.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Innovations including textile machinery, steam engines, interchangeable parts, t… 对理解「重建时期」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
